# asim_parsers_unmatched_report.csv

**Generated by:** [`map_solutions_connectors_tables.py`](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md)
**Granularity:** One row per ASIM parser that could not be associated with any connector
**Type:** Diagnostic report

## Overview

A diagnostic report listing ASIM parsers from [`asim_parsers.csv`](asim_parsers.md) for which the [Connector Association Algorithm](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md#connector-association-algorithm) found no matching connector. Useful for spotting:

- Source parsers whose vendor is not represented by any active connector in the repo.
- Parsers using filter fields that don't match any connector's filter values.
- Union parsers whose sub-parsers all failed to match.

## Use Cases

- **Coverage gap analysis** — find ASIM parsers that don't have an associated connector and triage whether the connector is missing or whether the parser/connector filters need adjustment.
- **Parser-authoring QA** — when adding a new ASIM parser, this report should not list it; otherwise its filters likely don't match the corresponding connector.
- **Connector-authoring QA** — a connector that should serve an ASIM parser but doesn't will leave the parser in this report.

## Columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `parser_name` | Parser function name |
| `parser_type` | `union`, `source`, or `empty` |
| `tables` | Semicolon-separated source tables of the parser |
| `filter_fields` | Pipe-separated filter-field clauses |
| `sub_parsers` | Semicolon-separated sub-parser references (union parsers only) |
| `reason` | Human-readable explanation of why no connector matched |

## Related CSVs

- [`asim_parsers.csv`](asim_parsers.md) — full parser inventory; this report is its complement.
- [`connectors.csv`](connectors.md) — to investigate why a candidate connector failed to match.
